title: Democracy in Asia
further_info: Recommended Reading • Croissant, Aurel 2022. Comparative Politics of Southeast Asia. Cham: Springer, 2nd ed. • Croissant, Aurel u. Jeffrey Haynes (eds.) 2021. Democratic Regressions in Asia. Special issue Democratization 28(1). • Derichs, Claudia, Thomas Heberer u. Gunter Schubert (eds.) 2023. Politische Systeme Ostasiens. 4. Auflage. Wiesbaden: Springer. • Hua, Shiping (ed.) 2018. Routledge Handbook of Politics in Asia. New York and London: Routledge.
